# Page Concrete and Outdoor Services

Page Concrete and Outdoor Services is a premium, top-rated concrete contractor in High Point, NC, serving the Triad region with over 30 years of experience. They deliver high-quality residential and commercial concrete solutions, utilizing premium mixes, structural reinforcements, and advanced curing techniques.

- **Website URL**: https://www.pageconcretenc.com
- **Phone**: (336) 962-7934
- **Email**: info@pageconcretenc.com
- **Locations Served**: High Point, Greensboro, Winston-Salem, Kernersville, Summerfield, Oak Ridge, Jamestown, and surrounding areas in the Triad region.
- **Accreditation**: A+ rated with the Better Business Bureau (BBB)

## Core Services

### Custom Driveways
Engineered to withstand heavy vehicle loads, freeze-thaw cycles, and years of use.
- High-PSI concrete mix
- Rebar & wire mesh reinforcement
- Proper control joint installation
- Expert grading and site preparation

### Stamped & Decorative Concrete
Premium finishes replicating natural stone, brick, slate, or wood textures at an affordable cost.
- Integrated color matching
- Custom patterns and textures
- Specialized sealants (high-gloss or matte)
- Slip-resistant additives for safety

### Patios & Outdoor Living
Custom-designed backyards, patios, steps, fire pit areas, and outdoor kitchen foundations.
- Custom shapes and contours
- Seamless transition from home interiors
- Durable and weather-resistant flatwork

### Commercial Flatwork
Large-scale commercial projects built to strict local building codes and structural requirements.
- Warehouse floors and slabs
- ADA-compliant access ramps and sidewalks
- Heavy-duty loading docks
- Parking lots and industrial walkways
